task.description: Create scripts/validate.sh that runs python3 -m py_compile on all .py files in scripts/.

l1.llm_content:
{
  "edit_description": "Update scripts/validate.sh to run py_compile on all .py files in scripts/.",
  "target_files": ["scripts/validate.sh"],
  "patch_commands": [
    "sed -i 's/.*runs python3 -m py_compile.*$/runs python3 -m py_compile on all .py files in scripts./' scripts/validate.sh",
    "sed -i 's/.*runs python3 -m py_compile.*$/runs python3 -m py_compile on all .py files in scripts./' scripts/validate.sh"
  ],
  "expected_outcome": "success looks like",
  "risk_notes": "Ensure py_compile is available in the Python environment and the script is executable.",
  "follow_up_type": "none|needs_review"
}
